task: Browse the class schedule of graduate-level chemistry courses on Monday afternoons in the winter of 2023.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Stanford ExploreCourses, selected academic year 2022-2023, Chemistry (CHEM), switched to schedule view, and applied filters for Winter, Monday, afternoon, and Graduate. The final page URL and snapshot show the filtered result state and the matching course visible on screen: CHEM 300 Department Colloquium, Winter 2022-2023, Mon 3:00 PM - 4:20 PM, Jan 9-Mar 17 2023, STLC 111, class #9221, section 01, instructor Markland, with notes indicating it is for pre-TGR Ph.D. candidates in chemistry. Although the page still displayed Autumn and Spring instances for the same course, the Winter filtered result and the Winter section were clearly visible, satisfying the task to browse the schedule of graduate-level chemistry courses on Monday afternoons in Winter 2023.
final_result_response:
I opened Stanford ExploreCourses and filtered Chemistry (CHEM) for Winter 2023, Monday, afternoon, Graduate.

Only matching course I found:

**CHEM 300: Department Colloquium**  
- **Term:** 2022-2023 Winter  
- **Schedule:** Mondays, 3:00 PM - 4:20 PM  
- **Dates:** Jan 9, 2023 - Mar 17, 2023  
- **Location:** STLC 111  
- **Class #:** 9221  
- **Section:** 01  
- **Units:** 1  
- **Grading:** Satisfactory/No Credit  
- **Instructor:** T. Markland  
- **Note:** For all pre-TGR Ph.D. candidates in Chemistry, plus undergraduates signed up for CHEM 190.
action_history: Opening Stanford website: const p0 = await openTab('https://www.stanford.edu/');
Searching Stanford for class schedule: await page.locator('e8').click();
Submitting site search: await page.locator('e126').fill('class schedule chemistry winter 2023 graduate Monday afternoon');
Opening Stanford ExploreCourses: const p1 = await openTab('https://explorecourses.stanford.edu/');
Switching to schedule view: await page.locator('e14').click();
